items.title: Save up to 34% on these three EGO Multi-Head Combo kit bundles with two attachments at new $390 lows

This bundle would normally go for $589 were you buying the string trimmer/power head and the pole saw attachment separately, and to make things better, previous discounts here have only ever gone as low as $518 – plus, the standalone string trimmer and power head kit that we usually see benefiting from discounts is currently priced at $389, making things all the sweeter. You’re saving $199 off the going rate for a new all-time low price. Alongside the above bundle, there are also bundles with the string trimmer/power head and an extra 12-inch brush cutter attachment at $389.99 shipped, as well as the same trimmer/power head package with an extra 8-inch carbon fiber edger also at $389.99 shipped.
